name: Integration - Retrieval and LLM Workflow
description: Tests the integration of RetrievalClient and LLMClient by submitting a question and verifying that the answer is grounded in retrieved chunks.
input: Simulate ApplicationOrchestrator.process_question with a valid question string.
output: A string answer that contains content from at least one retrieved chunk.
success_criteria: Answer contains text from one or more retrieved chunks
